title: Yggdrasil integration for mesh-gateway
description: Add support for running Yggdrasil in the Rust mesh-gateway. Use yggdrasil-go or the Rust port if available. Derive IPv6 from Ed25519 key to match node identity. Implement peering config, route advertisement for mesh prefix. Update forwarding to send non-local mesh packets to Yggdrasil TUN interface. Follow no_std where possible but std for gateway. Include config in Kconfig or toml. Tests for inter-mesh simulation.
close_reason: Spec updated to Ed25519-primary no-ULA, yggdrasil-derivation.json created with independent official oracles + cross-validation, schema/test_vectors.py/gateway notes updated, 3 codereview passes completed with all findings fixed, pytest PASS, all consistent
